raw_transcript: We can't restore the normal pumping motion, but we can fix the valve. We have three main options: we can stretch it with a balloon, inject it with Botox, or do a procedure called POEM—Peroral Endoscopic Myotomy—where we actually cut the muscle of that valve to let gravity do the work.
final_corrected_note: We can't restore the normal pumping motion, but we can fix the valve. We have three main options: we can stretch it with a balloon, inject it with Botox, or do a procedure called POEM—Peroral Endoscopic Myotomy—where we actually cut the muscle of that valve to let gravity do the work.
